items.description:
The Prospecti statue turns suddenly, causing its robes, which flow like fabric despite being as hard as stone, to swing about and damage opponents.

Creatures adjacent to the animated statue take @Damage[(2d6+6)[bludgeoning]] damage (@Check[reflex|dc:25|basic] save; on a critical failure, the creature is also knocked @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]).

Pulping Golem.name: Pulping Golem
Pulping Golem.description: Traditionally crafted into the forms of giant suits of armor or powerful animals, iron golems are products of exquisite artistry and skill. Their articulated joints and sturdy armored bodies require great care and mathematical precision to craft, and regular cleaning and oiling ensure they don't rust over the ages. With proper care, iron golems can remain in good shape for thousands of years, being passed down for generations, as long as they aren't destroyed by meddlesome adventurers. In addition to their incredible strength, iron golems possess a potent toxic breath weapon that is often more than enough to dispatch entire groups of opponents.

items.name: Реагирующий удар
items.description: @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.ReactiveStrike]

items.name: Clockwork Reconstruction
items.description: Each time Reginald is reborn in his lair, his machines graft him with a new clockwork modification. He chooses one of his abilities with the clockwork trait. He gains access to this ability but can't use any of his other clockwork abilities. He can't choose the same ability twice in a row. He begins with Ink Blood active.

items.name: Ink Blood
items.description:
Reginald's body is filled with toxic ink

Триггер: An adjacent creature Strikes Reginald with a melee weapon or unarmed attack and deals damage

Эффект: The creature is exposed to Reginald's poison ink.

items.name: Secret of Rebirth
items.description: If a creature with less than 5 Secret Knowledge points reduces Reginald to 0 HP (or dealt the last damage to him before he dies from using Overdrive Engine), Reginald's body dissipates into a puddle of ink and releases a black wave of psychic energy. Each creature within 30 feet is bathed in a torrent of forbidden secrets and gains 1 Secret Knowledge point. Reginald's body reforms [[/gmr 1d6 #rounds]]{1d6 rounds} later in his sanctum at full health at a location of his choosing (typically the Pool of Secrets, area L11). This ability activates automatically with no action necessary on Vancaskerkin's behalf.

items.name: Атака дыханием
items.description: Reginald's lungs are equipped with ink canisters, allowing him to spew a @Template[line|distance:60] of ink that deals @Damage[9d6[poison]|options:area-damage] damage (@Check[reflex|dc:39|basic|options:area-effect] save; on a failure, the creature is also subjected to Reginald's poison ink).

items.name: Overdrive Engine
items.description:
Reginald is equipped with clockwork organs to power his body

Требования: Reginald has 175 Hit Points or fewer

Эффект: Reginald gains 200 temporary Hit Points, a +15-foot status bonus to Speed, and a +2 status bonus to melee attack rolls. His body begins to overheat, spewing steam that deals @Damage[9d6[fire]|options:area-damage] damage at the beginning of his turn to all creatures within @Template[emanation|distance:30]{30 feet} (@Check[reflex|dc:40|basic|options:area-effect] save). After 2 rounds, Reginald explodes, dealing @Damage[19d6[fire]] damage to all creatures within @Template[emanation|distance:60]{60 feet} (@Check[reflex|dc:40|basic] save). Reginald dies. For the purposes of his Secret of Rebirth ability, the last creature to damage Reginald counts as killing him.

items.name: Poison Ink
items.description:
Reginald is immune to the toxic ink that flows through his veins

Спасбросок: @Check[fortitude|dc:38]

Макс.продолжительность: 10 раундов

Стадия 1: @Damage[3d6[poison]] and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1} (1 round)

Стадия 2: @Damage[4d6[poison]] @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2} (1 round).

items.name: Quill Cannon
items.description: Reginald is equipped with a cannon and hundreds of steel quills. He makes two steel quill attacks against every creature in a @Template[cone|distance:60], ignoring the multiple attack penalty until after all attacks are made. He can't use Quill Cannon again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Quill Cannon]]{1d4 rounds}.

items.name: Reflective Plating
items.description: Reginald engages his defensive plating, which casts @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.OOELvfkTedBMlWtq] on him (counteract modifier +32).

items.name: Скользить
items.description: With his body composed of ink and gears, Reginald can move through tight spaces as if he were a Tiny creature, treating them as difficult terrain.

Rhevanna.name: Rhevanna
Rhevanna.allSaves: +1 состояния ко всем спасброскам против магии

items.name: Реагирующий удар
items.description: @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.ReactiveStrike]

Rigged Cubby.name: Rigged Cubby
Rigged Cubby.disable: @Check[thievery|dc:20|name:Cut String|traits:action:disable-a-device] to cut the string without setting off the trap
Rigged Cubby.Hdescription: A hidden string connected to precariously stacked bricks causes the cubby to collapse in on itself when the string is pulled.

items.name: Отлично разящая боевая бритва +2
items.description: Боевая бритва — увеличенная версия парикмахерского инструмента. Это хрупкое, но чрезвычайно острое оружие, которое очень легко сунуть в карман или рукав.

items.name: Стойкий клёпаный кожаный доспех +2
items.description: Этот кожаный доспех усилен металлическими заклепками и иногда небольшими металлическими пластинами, обеспечивая большую часть гибкости кожаного доспеха с более надежной защитой.

items.name: Bloody Mayhem
items.description: Sad Liza Strides three times. Once per Stride, she can attempt a war razor Strike against a creature in her reach at any point during the Stride; she must make each Strike against a different creature, but she doesn't apply her multiple attack penalty until after making all her Strikes. If any of the Strikes are a critical failure, Bloody Mayhem immediately ends.

items.name: Close Cutter
items.description: Whenever Sad Liza deals slashing damage, the target takes an additional 2d10 persistent bleed damage.

items.name: Fan of Daggers
items.description: Sad Liza makes three ranged dagger Strikes, each against a separate target; she ignores the multiple attack penalty until after making all three Strikes. On a critical hit, the target takes @Damage[2d10[bleed]] damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2] for 1 round.

items.name: Knife Thrower
items.description: Sad Liza's ranged dagger Strikes have a range increment of 20 feet instead of 10 feet.

items.name: Внезапная атака
items.description: "Удары" Грустной Лизы наносят дополнительные 3d6 точного урона @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Застигнутым врасплох} существам.

items.name: +1 Striking Dagger
items.description: Это маленькое острое оружие держится одной рукой и используется, чтобы бить существ в ближнем бою. Еще его можно метать.

items.name: Книга заклинаний
items.description: Книга заклинаний содержит записанные знания, необходимые для изучения и подготовки различных заклинаний. Она необходима волшебникам (которые обычно получают её бесплатно) и является полезной роскошью для других заклинателей, желающих выучить дополнительные заклинания. Каждая книга заклинаний может содержать вплоть до 100 заклинаний. Цена указана для пустой книги.

items.name: Палочка бури осколков [3-го ранга]
items.description:
Эта палочка имеет резную голову дракона на вершине и полированную металлическую сферу посередине.

Активация: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.aBQ8ajvEBByv45yz]

Частота: Раз в день, плюс перегрузка

Эффект: Вы сотворяете @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.gKKqvLohtrSJj3BM] 3-го ранга.

После сотворения заклинания, в начале каждого вашего хода из палочки выпускается дополнительный осколок или осколки, как если бы вы сотворяли версию шквала силы в 1 действие. Каждый раз выбирайте цели. Это длится в течение 1 минуты, пока вы больше не владеете палочкой или пока снова не попытаетесь активировать палочку.

Требования для создания: Предоставить одно сотворение @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.gKKqvLohtrSJj3BM] соответствующего ранга.

items.name: Истощить палочку
items.description:
Частота: Раз в день

Требования: Scathka hasn't acted yet on their turn

Эффект: On their turn, Scathka casts one spell they've prepared and already cast this day without spending a spell slot. Scathka must still Cast the Spell and meet the spell's other requirements.

items.name: Throw Shadow Blade
items.description:
Требования: Scathka is wielding a dagger

Эффект: Scathka draws a shadowy glyph on the dagger's blade and flings it at a nearby foe. Scathka makes a ranged Strike with the dagger with the range increment to 30 feet.

If the Strike hits, it deals @Damage[8d6[cold]] damage (double damage on a critical success) and the target must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:32] save or be @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} until the end of its next turn (or [[/gmr 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4 rounds} on a critical failure).

The dagger loses its shadowy magic as soon as the attack is resolved.

Secret-Keeper.name: Secret-Keeper
Secret-Keeper.allSaves: +1 состояния ко всем спасброскам против ментального

items.name: +2 Striking Dagger
items.description: Это маленькое острое оружие держится одной рукой и используется, чтобы бить существ в ближнем бою. Еще его можно метать.

items.name: Cape of the Mountebank
items.description:
This bright red-and-gold cape is often interlaced with glittery threads and serves as a distraction. While wearing the cape, you gain a +2 item bonus to Deception checks.

Активация: @Glyph[Action 2] @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.pvQ5rY2zrtPI614F]

Частота: Раз в день

Эффект: You cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.VlNcjmYyu95vOUe8]. The space you leave and the one you appear in are filled with puffs of smoke that make anyone within concealed until they leave the smoke or the end of your next turn, at which point the smoke dissipates. Strong winds immediately disperse the smoke.

items.name: Религиозный символ Норгорбера
items.description: Этот кусок дерева или серебра гравирован изображением, представляющим божество. Некоторые сакральные заклинатели, такие как жрецы, могут использовать религиозный символ своего божества как сакральный фокус при использовании некоторых умений и сотворении некоторых заклинаний. Чтобы использовать религиозный символ, его надо держать в одной руке.

items.name: Бонус состояния +1 ко всем спасброскам от ментальных
Designate Apostate
items.description: Velberi designates one creature she can see within 30 feet as an apostate to the church of Norgorber, regardless of the creature's actual religious leanings. She can have up to four apostates designated at a time; any additional apostate removes another apostate of her choice. Velberi treats all Perception checks made to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1xRFPTFtWtGJ9ELw] against an apostate as one degree of success better, and her Strikes deal an additional 2d8 mental damage to apostates.

items.name: Реагирующий удар
items.description: @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.ReactiveStrike]

items.name: Реагирующий удар
items.description: @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.ReactiveStrike]

Shredskin.name: Shredskin
Shredskin.language: (не может говорить ни на одном языке)

items.name: Сжатие
items.description: When a shredskin successfully @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.kMcV8e5EZUxa6evt]{Squeezes}, it moves through the tight space at full speed. Narrow confines are not difficult terrain for a shredskin.

items.name: Сжимать
items.description:
@Damage[(1d4+4)[bludgeoning]], простой спасбросок @Check[fortitude|dc:16|basic]{Стойкости}

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.Constrict]

items.name: Control Body
items.description:
Требования: The shredskin is adjacent to a Medium or Small humanoid-shaped corpse

Эффект: The shredskin wraps itself around the corpse and takes control of the host body. While controlling a host, the shredskin uses the host's Speed but its own attacks, and it loses its Grab and Enshroud abilities.

Attacks that target the shredskin while it controls a body deal half of the damage to the shredskin and half of the damage to the host body. Attacks that target an area deal damage to both the shredskin and host body normally.

The shredskin can release the host body as a free action at the start of its turn. If the host is destroyed, the shredskin automatically releases the body and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg] for 1 round. A Medium corpse typically has 15 hit points, while a Small corpse typically has 10 Hit Points.

Creatures can notice that a corpse is controlled by a shredskin by succeeding a Perception check against the shredskin's Deception DC.

items.name: Enshroud
items.description:
Требования: The shredskin is grabbing a creature

Эффект: The shredskin attempts to pin the creature and wrap itself around the creature like a shirt. The shredskin rolls an @Check[athletics|against:fortitude] check against the creature's Fortitude DC.

On a success, the creature becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM] and the shredskin can take control of the creature as if using Control Body.

At the start of its turn, the shredskin can automatically Constrict the enshrouded creature as a free action.

An enshrouded creature can attempt a [[/act escape dc=16]] check to break free ([[/act escape dc=18]] if the shredskin critically succeeded its Athletics check to Enshroud).

items.name: Реагирующий удар
items.description: @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.ReactiveStrike]

items.name: Exorcism
items.description:
Mental damage ignores a siege shard's hardness.

Additionally, proving the siege shard's generative conflict is over with the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Ma93dpT4K7JbP9gu] activity reverts the creature to ordinary stone.

items.name: Surreptitious Siege
items.description: While a siege shard is embedded within a structure while using @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.vh1RpbWfqdNC4L3P], the structure and all objects within it take twice as long to repair.

items.name: Overwhelming Anguish
items.description:
Частота: Раз в минуту

Эффект: The siege shard emits a disorienting psychic blast. All creatures within a @Template[emanation|distance:15] take @Damage[4d6[mental]|options:area-damage] damage (@Check[will|dc:20|basic|options:area-effect] save).

items.name: Восстановление
items.description:
When a siege shard is destroyed within 100 feet of a structure, it reforms after [[/br 2d4 #days]] days within the nearest structure, fully healed.

A siege shard within a structure can permanently destroyed by the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.adventure-specific-actions.Item.QW2gYIKce3W31xXf] activity.

items.name: +1 Striking Shortsword
items.description: Эти клинки бывают разных форм и стилей, но они обычно 2 фута длиной.

items.name: Religious Symbol (Silver) of Norgorber
items.description: Этот кусок дерева или серебра гравирован изображением, представляющим божество. Некоторые сакральные заклинатели, такие как жрецы, могут использовать религиозный символ своего божества как сакральный фокус при использовании некоторых умений и сотворении некоторых заклинаний. Чтобы использовать религиозный символ, его надо держать в одной руке.

items.name: Wire Catch
items.description:
Every Skinsaw seamer keeps a sewing needle attached to a loop of thick silk, wrapped loosely around their hand not holding a weapon, which they can use in combat to snag or disarm attackers

Триггер: A creature hits the seamer with a melee Strike

Эффект: The seamer attempts an Athletics check to either [[/act grapple]] or [[/act disarm]] the triggering creature.

items.name: Flay
items.description:
Требования: The Skinsaw seamer dealt damage with a melee weapon other than its war razor with their last action

Эффект: The seamer makes a war razor Strike against the same creature that they just damaged. On a hit, the seamer slices a strip of flesh from the target and deals @Damage[1d6[bleed]] in addition to the war razor's usual damage.

items.name: Quick Stitch
items.description:
Требования: The Skinsaw seamer is currently grappling a creature

Эффект: The seamer stitches a piece of cloth to the creature's arm, face, or leg, potentially hindering it. The creature must attempt a @Check[reflex|dc:26|traits:damaging-effect] saving throw; if the seamer has already successfully used their Flay ability against the creature within the past minute, the creature's save result is one degree of success worse.

Критический успех: Существо невредимо.

Успех: Существо получает @Damage[1d4[piercing]].

Провал: The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh], @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1}, or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg] (seamer's choice). This effect lasts until the creature spends a single action to tear out the stitching, which deals @Damage[1d6[piercing]] damage to it.

Критический провал: The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 2}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2], @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 2}, or off-guard (seamer's choice). This effect lasts until the creature spends 2 actions to tear out the stitching, which deals @Damage[2d6[piercing]] damage to it.

items.name: +1 Striking Temple Sword
items.description: This heavy blade is favored by guardians of religious sites. It has a distinctive, crescent-shaped blade that seems to be a mix of a sickle and sword. It often has holes drilled into the blade or the pommel so that bells or other holy trinkets can be affixed to the weapon as an aid for prayer or mediation.

items.name: Стрелы
items.description: Эти снаряды являются амуницией для луков. Древко стрелы сделано из дерева. Она стабилизируется в полёте за счёт оперения на одном конце и имеет металлический наконечник на другом.

items.name: Возможность для атаки
items.description:
Триггер: Существо в досягаемости монстра совершает действие @Trait[Manipulate]{воздействия} или @Trait[Move]{движения}, атаку дальнего боя, или покидает квадрат во время используемого действия @Trait[Move]{движения}.

Эффект: Монстр совершает @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.VjxZFuUXrCU94MWR]{Удар} ближнего боя по спровоцировавшему существу. Если эта атака является критическим попаданием и спровоцировавшее действие имело признак @Trait[Manipulate]{воздействие}, то монстр прерывает это действие. Этот "Удар" не учитывается при подсчёте штрафа множественных атак монстра и его штраф множественных атак не применяется к этому "Удару".

items.name: Wary
items.description: The veteran isn't off-guard to hidden creatures and always gains a +4 circumstance bonus to their Perception DC against creatures attempting to Create a Diversion or Lie to the veteran.

items.name: Мощная атака
items.description: The veteran makes a melee Strike that counts as two attacks when calculating their multiple attack penalty. If this strike hits, it deals an extra die of weapon damage.

items.name: Взмах
items.description: Ветеран совершает "Удар" ближнего боя и сравнивает результат этого броска атаки с КБ вплоть до 2 противников, каждый из которых должен быть в его досягаемости ближнего боя и находиться рядом друг с другом. Киньте урон только 1 раз и применяйте его к каждому поражённому существу. "Взмах" считается за две атаки для штрафа множественных атак ветерана.

Summoning Rune (Barbazu Devil).name: Summoning Rune (Barbazu Devil)
Summoning Rune (Barbazu Devil).disable: @Check[perception|dc:18|name:Notice the Trap's Magic|traits:action:seek] to notice the trap's magic and avoid stepping on the floor outside the circle, followed by @Check[thievery|dc:21|name:Break Summoning Circle|traits:action:disable-a-device] (trained) to break the circle or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.9HpwDN4MYQJnW0LG]{Dispel Magic} (3rd level; counteract DC 23) to counteract the rune
Summoning Rune (Barbazu Devil).reset: The trap resets each day at dawn.

items.name: Summon Devil
items.description:
Триггер: A living creature steps on any part of the floor not enclosed by the summoning circle

Эффект: One round after a creature touches the triggering area, the door to the room slams shut and locks (two [[/act pick-a-lock dc=20]]{Thievery} checks to pick) and a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.pathfinder-bestiary.Actor.FIoRPHaHdYUPVKdT] devil appears in the summoning circle.

The devil rolls initiative and remains for [[/br 3d6 #rounds]]{3d6 rounds}, after which the spell ends and the devil disappears. The devil also disappears if someone disables the trap before the duration expires.

The summoned devil can use 3 actions each round and can use reactions, unlike most summoned creatures.

Summoning Rune (Barbazu Devil).Hdescription: A summoning circle inlaid into the room's floor detects living creatures and summons a violent devil.

Summoning Rune (Cinder Rat).name: Summoning Rune (Cinder Rat)
Summoning Rune (Cinder Rat).disable: @Check[acrobatics|dc:22|name:Approach Rune] (trained) to approach without triggering the trap, followed by @Check[thievery|dc:22|name:Erase Summoning Rune|traits:action:disable-a-device] (trained) to erase the rune or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.9HpwDN4MYQJnW0LG]{Dispel Magic} (3rd level; counteract DC 20) to counteract the rune
Summoning Rune (Cinder Rat).reset: The trap resets each day at dawn.

items.name: Summon Elementals
items.description:
Триггер: A living creature enters the room

Эффект: Two rounds after a creature enters the room, the room's door slams shut and locks (two [[/act pick-a-lock dc=20]]{Thievery} checks to pick), and two @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.pathfinder-monster-core.Actor.xN5J9S485LxFZMkL] fire elementals emerge from the floor.

The elementals roll initiative and remain for [[/gmr 3d6 #rounds]]{3d6 rounds}, after which the spell ends and the creatures disappear. The elementals also disappear if someone disables the trap before the duration expires.

The summoned elementals can use 3 actions each round and can use reactions, unlike most summoned creatures.

Summoning Rune (Cinder Rat).Hdescription: An invisible cloud of magical sensors detects living creatures in the room and summons fire elementals to slay the creatures.

Supplicant Statues.name: Supplicant Statues
Supplicant Statues.disable: @Check[thievery|dc:34|name:Disable Statue Rollers|traits:action:disable-a-device] (master) to disable a specific statue's rollers, or @Check[thievery|dc:39|name:Disable Trap (Control Panel)|traits:action:disable-a-device] (master) on the control panel in A4 deactivates the whole trap. For each statue disabled, the trap loses 1 action from its routine and the DC for its predictive impediment ability decreases by 4. @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.9HpwDN4MYQJnW0LG]{Dispel Magic} (7th level, counteract DC 32) doesn't harm the statues but removes the predictive impediment ability. Breaking the control panel prevents the trap from resetting.
Supplicant Statues.reset: The trap deactivates and resets one minute after the room is empty.
Supplicant Statues.routine: (6 actions) On the trap's initiative, each functioning statue slides up to 40 feet around the room and makes a statue shortsword Strike against an adjacent creature. The trap doesn't take a multiple attack penalty, and the statues' movements don't trigger reactions.
Supplicant Statues.Hdescription: Six statues rapidly slide around the room on rollers, slowing down intruders and striking at them with spring-loaded sword arms.

items.name: +1 Striking Elven Curve Blade
items.description: По сути, это удлиненная версия скимитара, традиционное эльфийское оружие имеет более тонкий клинок, чем его двоюродный брат.

items.name: Теневой шаг
items.description:
The svartalfar killer fades into shadow, Strides up to twice its Speed, and reforms.

This movement doesn't trigger reactions, but the svartalfar killer must begin and end in an area of dim light or darkness.

items.name: Внезапная атака
items.description: "Удары" svartalfar killer наносят дополнительные 2d6 точного урона по @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Застигнутым врасплох} существам.

items.name: Spell-Imbued Blade
items.description:
The svartalfar killer chooses @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.gISYsBFby1TiXfBt], @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.6DfLZBl8wKIV03Iq], @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.J7Y7tl0bbdz7TcCc], or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.r3NeUnsgt9mS03Sn] and makes a melee Strike.

If the svartalfar killer hits, they cast the chosen spell through the weapon at the same target. The spell's attack roll is the same result as the Strike.

items.name: Obscuring Grab
items.description: While the tenome is Grabbing a creature, all other creatures are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W] to the tenome.

items.name: Bone Drink
items.description:
Требования: The tenome has a creature grabbed or restrained

Эффект: The tenome makes a jaws Strike against the grabbed or restrained creature. If the Strike hits, the creature must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:18] save or become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 1} (or the value of the creature's drained condition increases by 1 if it already has a drained value, to a maximum of drained 4).

The tenome regains @Damage[1d8[healing]] Hit Points each time it uses Bone Drink.

items.name: Burst of Speed
items.description:
The tenome Strides twice, Steps twice, or Steps and Strides (in either order).

It cannot use Burst of Speed again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Burst of Speed]]{1d4 rounds}.

items.name: Ужасающий взгляд
items.description:
1 or 2 actions

A tenome can gaze at a creature within 30 feet by presenting one of its eyes. The target must succeed at a @Check[will|dc:21] save or become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}. If the tenome uses 2 actions and presents both of its eyes, the target is also @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF] if it fails the save.

A creature that successfully saves is temporarily immune for 24 hours.

Teraphant.name: Teraphant
Teraphant.language: (не может говорить ни на одном языке)

items.name: Emotion Sense 120 feet
items.description: A teraphant can sense the emotions of creatures within 120 feet as an imprecise sense. Emotion sense is a precise sense against creatures under an emotion effect. A creature under the effects of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.b515AZlB0sridKSq] can't be noticed via emotion sense.

items.name: Empathetic Response
items.description:
Триггер: A creature within 60 feet of the teraphant is targeted by a spell or ability with the emotion trait

Эффект: The teraphant also benefits from the spell or effect, as though it were an additional target for 1 minute or until the triggering spell or ability ends.

items.name: Impale
items.description:
Требования: The teraphant has a creature grabbed

Эффект: The teraphant slams the creature onto one of its horns. The target must attempt a @Check[reflex|dc:27|basic] save or suffer @Damage[(3d6+9)[piercing]] damage and @Damage[1d6[bleed]] (@Damage[(6d6+18)[piercing]] damage on a critical failure).

items.name: Psychokinetic Trumpet
items.description:
The teraphant lets out a loud trumpet that deals @Damage[8d8[mental]|options:area-damage] damage (@Check[will|dc:27|basic|options:area-effect,forced-movement] save) in a @Template[cone|distance:30]. A creature that fails its save is also pushed 15 feet (30 feet on a critical failure).

If a pushed creatures strikes a solid barrier, it takes @Damage[3d6[bludgeoning]] damage and stops.

The teraphant can't use Psychokinetic Trumpet again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Psychokinetic Trumpet]]{1d4 rounds}.

items.name: Растоптать
items.description:
Большой или менее, нога, простой спасбросок @Check[reflex|dc:27|basic]{Рефлекса}

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.Trample]

items.name: Хватающий хобот
items.description: A Medium or smaller creature hit by the teraphant's trunk is grabbed. If the teraphant moves, it can bring the grabbed creature along with it.

The Inkmaster.name: The Inkmaster
The Inkmaster.description:
Шемазианы восстают из душ мучителей и тех, кто упивался изувечиванием физических тел своих жертв. Шемазиан ростом в @Unit[Foot|35]{35 футов} хорошо оснащён разнообразными когтями, клешнями и клыками, чтобы продолжать причинять такие мучения тем, с кем сталкивается.

Шемазианы, конечно, получают удовольствие от мучений смертных, но больше, чем большинство демонов, они радуются тому, что разделяют боль с себе подобными. По этой причине другие демоны боятся и ненавидят шемазианов, и только самые могущественные готовы работать с шемазианами для достижения общей цели. Но даже в этом случае шемазианы всегда начеку и ищут возможность принести боль и страдания своим союзникам, а также любому врагу.
The Inkmaster.allSaves: +1 состояние ко всем спасброскам против магии

items.name: Бонус состояния +1 ко всем спасброскам от магии
Заводной мозг
items.description: A second brain, made of clockwork, is implanted in the Inkmaster's skull. Any time he makes a Will save, he rolls twice and takes the higher result.

items.name: Парализующий взгляд
items.description: 30 feet. A non-evil creature that ends its turn in the aura must attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:35|options:area-effect,inflicts:slowed,inflicts:paralyzed] save. If it fails, it's @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} for 1 round, and if it critically fails, it is instead @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF] for 1 round.

items.name: Уязвимость к оказанию помощи
items.description: Увечья от шемазиана это часть их сути, и они не выносят, если их обратят. Первый раз в раунд, когда существо исцеляется от урона причиненного шемазианом в его прошлый ход, демон получает @Damage[3d6[mental]].

items.name: Захлестнуть хвостом
items.description:
Триггер: Существо в пределах досягаемости хвоста шемазиана покидает квадрат используемым действием @Trait[Move]{движение}.

Эффект: Шемазиан пытается [[/act trip]]{Опрокинуть} спровоцировавшее существо. При успехе существо еще получает урон, как если бы шемазиан попал @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.VjxZFuUXrCU94MWR]{Ударом} хвоста, а если существо летало, то оно падает на 30 футов.

items.name: Ослабляющий укус
items.description: If the shemhazian's jaws Strike damages a creature, the target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 3}. The target can attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:37|options:inflicts:enfeebled] save to reduce this to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1} (or be unaffected on a critical success).

items.name: Сосредоточенный взгляд
items.description: The shemhazian focuses their gaze on a non-evil creature they can see within 30 feet. If that creature isn't already slowed by the shemhazian's paralyzing gaze, it must attempt a save against the shemhazian's paralyzing gaze. If that creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3], it must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:35|options:inflicts:paralyzed] save or be @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF] for 1 round. A shemhazian can't use this ability against the same creature more than once per round.

items.name: Раздирать
items.description:
Коготь

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.Rend]

items.name: Улучшенный захват
items.description:
Требования: The monster's last action was a success with a Strike that lists Improved Grab in its damage entry, or it has a creature grabbed using this action.

Эффект: The monster automatically Grabs the target until the end of the monster's next turn. The creature is grabbed by whichever body part the monster attacked with, and that body part can't be used to Strike creatures until the grab is ended. Using Improved Grab extends the duration of the monster's Improved Grab until the end of its next turn for all creatures grabbed by it, but this costs an action. A grabbed creature can use the Escape action to get out of the grab, and the Grab ends for a grabbed creatures if the monster moves away from it.

The Laughing Fiend's Greeting.name: The Laughing Fiend's Greeting
The Laughing Fiend's Greeting.disable: @Check[thievery|dc:44|name:Disable Thievery] (legendary) to obscure or mar the magical runes set into the mural, or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.9HpwDN4MYQJnW0LG] (9th rank; counteract DC 42) to counteract the mural
The Laughing Fiend's Greeting.Hdescription: Subtle but deadly magical runes link this mural to Kharnas's master. Good- or neutral-aligned creatures who examine the mural witness the castle's drawbridge silently descend, revealing an endless darkness.

items.name: Удача полурослика
items.description:
Частота: Раз в день

Триггер: The Rabbit Prince fails a skill check or a saving throw

Эффект: The Rabbit Prince rerolls the triggering check, but he must use the new result, even if it's worse.

items.name: Perfect Will
items.description: If the Rabbit Prince rolls a success on a Will save, he gets a critical success instead, and if he rolls a critical failure, he gets a failure instead.

items.name: Superior Senses
items.description: The Rabbit Prince automatically critically succeeds at Seek actions to find hidden or undetected creatures within 30 feet and at flat checks to target creatures within 30 feet that are concealed or hidden from him.

items.name: Bloody Jab
items.description: Whenever the Rabbit Prince deals piercing damage, he also deals 2d10 persistent bleed damage.

items.name: Darting Flurry
items.description: The Rabbit Prince Strides and makes a blade of the Rabbit Prince Strike and a harrow card Strike at any point during the Stride. His multiple attack penalty increases only after both attacks.

items.name: Occult Rituals
items.description: DC 38; imprisonment, inveigle

items.name: Quick Movements
items.description: The Rabbit Prince doesn't trigger reactions with his movement or with any use of the Thievery skill.

The Stabbing Beast.name: The Stabbing Beast
The Stabbing Beast.allSaves: +1 состояния ко всем спасброскам против ментального

The Winder.name: The Winder
The Winder.disable: @Check[thievery|dc:50|name:Deactivate System|traits:action:disable-a-device] (master) to deactivate the system, or @Check[athletics|dc:40|name:Jam Gears] (legendary) to jam the gears for 1 round
The Winder.reset: The Winder resets as soon as no creatures remain in the room.
The Winder.routine: (1, 2, or 4 actions, depending on the encounter's threat level) The Winder uses each of its actions to Wind clockwork assassins in the room, starting with inactive ones.
The Winder.Hdescription: A large metallic arm, 20 feet long, is set into the floor. It rotates around the room to wind up nearby clockwork creatures.

Tiderunner Aquamancer.name: Tiderunner Aquamancer
Tiderunner Aquamancer.allSaves: +1 состояние ко всем спасброскам против очарования, -2 ко всем спасброскам против эффектов аболетов

items.name: Отлично разящая боевая бритва +2
items.description: Боевая бритва — увеличенная версия парикмахерского инструмента. Это хрупкое, но чрезвычайно острое оружие, которое очень легко сунуть в карман или рукав.

items.name: Стойкий клёпаный кожаный доспех +2
items.description: Этот кожаный доспех усилен металлическими заклепками и иногда небольшими металлическими пластинами, обеспечивая большую часть гибкости кожаного доспеха с более надежной защитой.

items.name: Bloody Mayhem
items.description: Twisted Jack Strides three times. Once per Stride, he can attempt a war razor Strike against a creature in his reach at any point during the Stride; he must make each Strike against a different creature, but he doesn't apply his multiple attack penalty until after making all his Strikes. If any of the Strikes are a critical failure, Bloody Mayhem immediately ends.

items.name: Close Cutter
items.description: Whenever Twisted Jack deals slashing damage, the target takes an additional 2d10 persistent bleed damage.

items.name: Fan of Daggers
items.description: Twisted Jack makes three ranged dagger Strikes, each against a separate target; he ignores the multiple attack penalty until after making all three Strikes. On a critical hit, the target takes @Damage[2d10[bleed]] damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2] for 1 round.

items.name: Knife Thrower
items.description: Twisted Jack's ranged dagger Strikes have a range increment of 20 feet instead of 10 feet.

items.name: Внезапная атака
items.description: Twisted Jack deals an additional 3d6 precision damage to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg] targets.

Ulressia The Blessed.name: Ulressia The Blessed
Ulressia The Blessed.allSaves: +1 состояние ко всем спасброскам против магии

items.name: Реагирующий удар
items.description: @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.ReactiveStrike]

items.name: Чувствительность к движению 60 футов
items.description: A vaultbreaker ooze can sense nearby motion through vibration and air movement.

items.name: Treasure Sense (Imprecise) 30 feet
items.description: The vaultbreaker ooze's metallic plasm alerts it to the presence of metals with the precious trait (including gold and platinum) within 30 feet.

items.name: Metallify
items.description:
Триггер: A creature Strikes the vaultbreaker ooze

Эффект: The ooze's outer plasm hardens into a protective shell of precious metals. Until the start of its next turn, it gains resistance 5 to physical damage (except adamantine), it has a –5-foot penalty to its Speed, and its pseudopod Strikes gain the versatile S or P weapon trait.

items.name: Поглотить
items.description:
@Check[reflex|dc:23|traits:damaging-effect], @Damage[(2d8+9)[acid]] damage, [[/act escape dc=23]], Rupture 14 (19 when using Metallify)

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.Engulf]

items.name: Form Tool
items.description: The vaultbreaker ooze instinctually shapes its pseudopod into a key, lockpick, or tool required to bypass a locking mechanism; it uses this pseudopod as thieves' tools to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.2EE4aF4SZpYf0R6H] or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.cYdz2grcOcRt4jk6].

Veksciralenix.name: Veksciralenix
Veksciralenix.allSaves: +1 состояние ко всем спасброскам против магии

items.name: Бонус состояния +1 ко всем спасброскам от магии
Alien Presence
items.description:
90 feet. A creature that first enters the area must attempt a @Check[will|dc:42] save.

Regardless of the result of the saving throw, the creature is temporarily immune to the Veksciralenix's Alien Presence for 1 minute.

Критический успех: Существо невредимо.

Успех: Существо @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Замедлено 1} на 1 раунд.

Провал: Существо @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Замедлено 1} на [[/r 1d4 #раунды]]{1d4 раунда}.

Критический провал: Существо @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Замедлено 1} на 1 минуту.

items.name: Возможность для атаки (только челюсти)
items.description:
Только челюсти

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.AttackOfOpportunity]

items.name: Второй шанс
items.description:
Частота: 3 раза в день

Триггер: Veksciralenix or a creature that Veksciralenix can see attempts a check and learns the results

Эффект: The triggering creature rerolls the triggering check and takes the second result.

items.name: Атака дыханием
items.description:
The time dragon breathes in one of two ways.

The dragon can't use Breath Weapon again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Breath Weapon]]{1d4 rounds}.

Storm: The dragon breathes a burst of lightning in a @Template[cone|distance:50] that deals @Damage[20d6[electricity]|options:area-damage] damage (@Check[reflex|dc:42|basic|name:Storm Breath|options:area-effect] save).

Time Displacement: (arcane, transmutation) The dragon breathes a time storm. Each creature within a @Template[cone|distance:50] must attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:42|name:Time Displacement Breath|traits:transmutation] save.

Критический успех: Существо невредимо.

Успех: Существо @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Ошеломлено 1}.

Провал: Существо @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Ошеломлено 4}.

Критический провал: Существо @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Ошеломлено 6}.

items.name: Драконье неистовство
items.description: Veksciralenix makes two claw Strikes and one wing Strike in any order.

items.name: Драконий импульс
items.description: Veksciralenix recharges their Breath Weapon whenever they score a critical hit with a Strike.

items.name: Venom Explosion
items.description:
Триггер: The venom mage is reduced to 0 Hit Points

Эффект: The venom mage explodes into a cloud of poison within a @Template[burst|distance:20]. The venom mage then reforms at a point they choose within the burst, avoids being knocked out, and remains at 1 Hit Point. The venom mage's wounded value increases by 1 when they use this ability, and they can't use this ability when they're wounded 3 or more. Creatures other than the venom mage within the burst must attempt a Fortitude save.

Критический успех: Нет эффекта.

Успех: The creature is sickened 1.

Провал: The creature is sickened 2 and cannot recover from the sickened condition while within 20 feet of the venom mage.

Критический провал: As failure, but sickened 4.

items.name: Стойкое колдовство
items.description: If another creature's reaction would disrupt the venom mage's spellcasting action, the venom mage attempts a @Check[flat|dc:15] check. If the venom mage succeeds, their action isn't disrupted.

items.name: Кинжал
items.description: Это маленькое острое оружие держится одной рукой и используется, чтобы бить существ в ближнем бою. Еще его можно метать.

items.name: Клёпаный кожаный доспех
items.description: Этот кожаный доспех усилен металлическими заклепками и иногда небольшими металлическими пластинами, обеспечивая большую часть гибкости кожаного доспеха с более надежной защитой.

items.name: Посох отравителя
items.description:
Этот узловатый посох покрыт шипами и блестящим лаком, который действует как слабый раздражитель. Пока вы держите посох, его покрытие и шипы не влияют на вас, а также вы снижаете КС чистой проверки для избавления от продолжительного урона ядом с 15 до 13.

Активация: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.aBQ8ajvEBByv45yz]

Эффект: Вы тратите количество зарядов из посоха, чтобы сотворить заклинание из его списка.

  • Чары: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.izcxFQFwf3woCnFs]
  • 1-й: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.QqxwHeYEVylkYjsO], @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.DYdvMZ8G2LiSLVWw]

Требования для создания: Предоставить одно сотворение всех указанных рангов всех перечисленных заклинаний.

Water Elemental Vessel.name: Water Elemental Vessel
Water Elemental Vessel.description: Spellcasters create elemental vessels by harvesting raw elemental energy and then binding it within a specially enchanted magic circle to grant it life.

items.name: Spell Circle
items.description: By performing an hour-long ritual, an elemental vessel can form a spell circle with an arcane or primal spellcaster. After the spell circle is formed, other spellcasters can join the spell circle by performing the same hour-long ritual while assisted by at least one spellcaster already in the spell circle. Each member of the spell circle must contribute at least one spell to the elemental vessel. The spellcaster permanently loses access to a spell slot equal to the spell's rank and the elemental vessel adds the contributed spell to its list of arcane innate spells (regardless of the spell's original type). An elemental vessel can be imbued with no more than three spells per spell rank. If the elemental vessel is destroyed, all members of the spell circle regain the spell slots they contributed to the creature. The arcane innate spells shown below represent a typical spell list for an elemental vessel, but each elemental vessel is likely to have different spells depending on what its spell circle has contributed.

items.name: Dispel Vulnerability
items.description: Whenever a creature successfully counteracts one of its spells, the vessel permanently loses access to that spell and takes damage equal to 4 × the spell's rank. The spell circle member who contributed that spell regains access to their contributed spell slot.

items.name: Вселиться в сосуд
items.description: Any member of the elemental vessel's spell circle can spend 3 actions to mentally inhabit the vessel for 1 round. While they inhabit the vessel, the inhabiter controls the vessel's actions, and the vessel uses the inhabiter's Intelligence, Wisdom, and Charisma modifiers for all checks. Only one creature can inhabit an elemental vessel at a time.

items.name: Поглотить
items.description:
Спасбросок @Check[reflex|dc:35]{Рефлекса}, без урона, [[/act escape dc=35]], Разрыв 28

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.Engulf]

items.name: Internal Spell Strike
items.description: The elemental vessel targets an engulfed creature with one of its spells. The spell must have a range of touch.

Спасбросок @Check[reflex|dc:35]{Рефлекса}, без урона, [[/act escape dc=35]], Разрыв 28

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.Engulf]

items.name: Internal Spell Strike
items.description: The elemental vessel targets an engulfed creature with one of its spells. The spell must have a range of touch.

Waxworks Onslaught Trap.name: Waxworks Onslaught Trap
Waxworks Onslaught Trap.disable: @Check[thievery|dc:43|name:Drain Wax from a Tub|traits:action:disable-a-device] (master) to drain the wax from a tub or @Check[athletics|dc:45|name:Push Through Wax|traits:action:force-open] (master) to push through the wax blocking a sealed door and escape (other creatures must push their own way through, as the wax reseals)
Waxworks Onslaught Trap.reset: The trap deactivates and resets after 1 hour. At that time, the wax in the tubs cools and congeals, and any wax elsewhere in the room magically goes back into the tubs.
Waxworks Onslaught Trap.routine: (4 actions) The trap loses 1 action each turn per drained or destroyed tub. On each action, a different tub spews hot wax at a random creature in the room, dealing @Damage[3d12[fire]|options:area-damage] damage to the target and all adjacent creatures (@Check[reflex|dc:35|basic|options:area-effect] save). On a failure or critical failure, the creature is also encased in hot wax. A creature that starts its turn encased in wax takes @Damage[8d12[fire]] damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe] until it [[/act escape dc=35]]{Escapes} the hardening wax. Each turn it remains encased, the damage dealt by the hot wax decreases by 2d12 but the DC to Escape increases by 2 (minimum 0 damage, maximum DC 43). A creature that can't get free from the wax might suffocate.
Waxworks Onslaught Trap.hp: to destroy a tub and prevent it from making any further attacks; Door Seal Hardness 18; Door Seal HP 72 (BT 36) to destroy the wax on a sealed door and allow anyone to escape through the door
Waxworks Onslaught Trap.Hdescription: Four huge tubs containing congealed wax, enchanted to melt and envelop unwary intruders, each sit atop a cold fire.

items.name: Реагирующий удар
items.description: @Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.ReactiveStrike]

items.name: +2 Greater Striking Longsword
items.description: Длинный меч может быть с односторонним клинком или обоюдоострым. Их клинки тяжелые и длиной между 3 и 4 футами.

items.name: +2 Resilient Full Plate
items.description: Plate mail consists of interlocking plates that encase nearly the entire body in a carapace of steel. It is costly and heavy, and the wearer often requires help to don it correctly, but it provides some of the best defense armor can supply. A suit of this armor comes with an undercoat of padded armor (see below) and a pair of gauntlets.

items.name: Возможность для атаки
items.description:
Триггер: Существо в досягаемости монстра совершает действие @Trait[Manipulate]{воздействия} или @Trait[Move]{движения}, атаку дальнего боя, или покидает квадрат во время используемого действия @Trait[Move]{движения}.

Эффект: Монстр совершает @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.VjxZFuUXrCU94MWR]{Удар} ближнего боя по спровоцировавшему существу. Если эта атака является критическим попаданием и спровоцировавшее действие имело признак @Trait[Manipulate]{воздействие}, то монстр прерывает это действие. Этот "Удар" не учитывается при подсчёте штрафа множественных атак монстра и его штраф множественных атак не применяется к этому "Удару".

items.name: Tactical Aura
items.description: 60 feet. Allies of lower level than Wynsal in the aura gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-ability-glossary-srd.Item.hFtNbo1LKYCoDy2O] reaction. Allies who already have the Attack of Opportunity reaction can use it when a creature within their reach uses a concentrate action, in addition to normal triggers, and they disrupt a triggering concentrate action on a critical hit.

items.name: Demanding Orders
items.description: Wynsal commands his allies to take action. Allies within 120 feet who hear and understand his order are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl]{Quickened 1} for 1 round and can use this extra action to Stride, Strike, or Step.

items.name: Целеустремленность
items.description: Wynsal either ends a nonpermanent condition affecting him or counteracts a nonpermanent spell affecting him (counteract rank 17th, counteract check [[/r 1d20+30 #Counteract]]{+30}). This doesn't remove Hit Point damage or prevent the spell or effect from affecting others. It can't remove an ongoing affliction or conditions from a situation outside his control (such as being grabbed or flanked).

items.name: Formation Attack
items.description: Wynsal deals 3d8 extra damage to any creature that's within reach of at least two of his allies.

items.name: Hampering Strike
items.description: A foe that takes damage from Wynsal's melee Strike is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} for 1 round. If it's already slowed, the value of the slowed condition increases by 1.

items.name: +1 Striking Morningstar
items.description: Это оружие имеет короткую рукоять, оканчивающуюся металлическим шаром с шипами.

items.name: Пули для пращи
items.description: Это маленькие металлические шарики, обычно из железа или свинца, изготовленные для использования как амуниция к праще.

items.name: Little Favors
items.description: Each time a creature willingly performs a service, quest, or task for the zealborn, the creature takes a cumulative -1 status penalty to saving throws against the zealborn's mental spells and abilities (maximum -4).

items.name: Восстановление
items.description: When a zealborn is destroyed, it re-forms, fully healed, near a follower of its choice in [[/gmr 1d10 #days]]{1d10 days}. For the purposes of rejuvenation, a follower is defined as an intelligent creature who's well acquainted with the zealborn and is a true believer in the zealborn's mission, not merely a lukewarm supporter. A zealborn can be permanently destroyed only if they have no current followers or can be convinced to end their own life.

items.name: Zealous Restoration
items.description: A zealborn can't regain Hit Points through resting or void healing; they feed only on the idealism of their supporters, regaining 10 Hit Points per day for each creature under the effects of a geas cast by the zealborn. Creatures under a zealborn's geas have their maximum HP reduced by 10 each day until they are burned away to a husk and perish. After 24 hours, such creatures rise as zeal-damned ghouls under the zealborn's control. Zeal-damned ghouls eat only the flesh of evil or chaotic creatures and deal an additional 1d6 spirit and 1d6 void damage with their attacks.

items.name: Праща
items.description: Немного больше, чем кожаная чашка, прикрепленная к паре ремней, праща может быть использована для метания гладких камней или пуль на расстоянии.

items.name: Нагрудник
items.description: Несмотря на то, что он называется нагрудником, этот тип доспеха состоит из нескольких частей латного или полулатного доспеха, которые защищают туловище, грудь, шею, а иногда бедра и ноги. Он дает защиту важным частям как латный, обеспечивая при этом большую гибкость и скорость.
